page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A computational tool for identifying protein carbonylation sites by novel encoded features.

The role of this page is a brief introduction to iCarPS.

to view more scientific achievements.

iCarPS is a server for the prediction of carbonylation sites based on omputational method.
